message:
fix(runtime): close spawn/shutdown TOCTOU race in BlockingPool

After pushing a task to the queue, re-check the shutdown flag to close
the window where shutdown starts after the task is enqueued but before
workers pick it up. If shutdown occurred during the push, the task is
cancelled immediately and the completion is signalled to prevent
callers from deadlocking on a lost task.

New test (tests/blocking_pool_toctou.rs): regression test that
exercises the race by spawning concurrent spawn + shutdown threads
10,000 times. Before this fix, the test would intermittently
deadlock on handle.wait_timeout().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
